ticket_recommendations.title: The generated bootstrap freshness contract cannot detect host drift for this repo
ticket_recommendations.description: Remediate BOOT003 by correcting the validated issue and rerunning the relevant quality checks.
ticket_recommendations.suggested_fix_approach: Hash stack-sensitive repo surfaces plus host-side prerequisite signals so bootstrap becomes stale when the machine setup changes, then rerun environment_bootstrap after package repair installs the stronger freshness model.
ticket_recommendations.summary: Hash stack-sensitive repo surfaces plus host-side prerequisite signals so bootstrap becomes stale when the machine setup changes, then rerun environment_bootstrap after package repair installs the stronger freshness model.

ticket_recommendations.title: Remediation review artifact does not contain runnable command evidence
ticket_recommendations.description: Remediate EXEC-REMED-001 by correcting the validated issue and rerunning the relevant quality checks.
ticket_recommendations.suggested_fix_approach: For remediation tickets with `finding_source`, require the review artifact to record the exact command run, include raw command output, and state the explicit PASS/FAIL result before the review counts as trustworthy closure.
ticket_recommendations.summary: For remediation tickets with `finding_source`, require the review artifact to record the exact command run, include raw command output, and state the explicit PASS/FAIL result before the review counts as trustworthy closure.

ticket_recommendations.title: Interactive consumer-facing repo still relies on a weak generic finish bar instead of explicit interaction-proof requirements
ticket_recommendations.description: Remediate FINISH004 by correcting the validated issue and rerunning the relevant quality checks.
ticket_recommendations.suggested_fix_approach: Replace generic machine-generated finish_acceptance_signals with repo-specific interactive proof requirements, and require FINISH-VALIDATE-001 to demand user-observable interaction evidence in addition to load/export proof.
ticket_recommendations.summary: Replace generic machine-generated finish_acceptance_signals with repo-specific interactive proof requirements, and require FINISH-VALIDATE-001 to demand user-observable interaction evidence in addition to load/export proof.
